'''fajaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hdwd|hdwd]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hdwd|hdwd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fajaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæjæyæth|fæjæyæth]] || [[word:fæjæyæj|fæjæyæj]] || [[word:fæjæyæsh|fæjæyæsh]] || [[word:fæjæyæ|fæjæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fajajayath|fajajayath]] || [[word:fajajayaj|fajajayaj]] || [[word:fajajayash|fajajayash]] || [[word:fajajaya|fajajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fajayath|fajayath]] || [[word:fajayaj|fajayaj]] || [[word:fajayash|fajayash]] || [[word:fajaya|fajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fajafyath|fajafyath]] || [[word:fajafyaj|fajafyaj]] || [[word:fajafyash|fajafyash]] || [[word:fajafyaf|fajafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fajayatha|fajayatha]] || [[word:fajayaja|fajayaja]] || [[word:fajayasha|fajayasha]] || [[word:fajayaka|fajayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fajayath|fajayath]] || [[word:fajayaj|fajayaj]] || [[word:fajayash|fajayash]] || [[word:fajaya|fajaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fajayathal|fajayathal]] || [[word:fajayajal|fajayajal]] || [[word:fajayashal|fajayashal]] || [[word:fajayakal|fajayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fajayathatha|fajayathatha]] || [[word:fajayajaja|fajayajaja]] || [[word:fajayashasha|fajayashasha]] || [[word:fajayaka|fajayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fajayathan|fajayathan]] || [[word:fajayajan|fajayajan]] || [[word:fajayashan|fajayashan]] || [[word:fajayakan|fajayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fajayathaoro|fajayathaoro]] || [[word:fajayajaoro|fajayajaoro]] || [[word:fajayashaoro|fajayashaoro]] || [[word:fajayakaoro|fajayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
